title: Regional Rituals; Pokemon Spawn Expansion
description: A datapack and resourcepack combination for Cobblemon; This adds a large portion of the regional variant pokemon to your world!
body: This add-on for Cobblemon 1.3.2 adds a large portion of the regional variants to the game, using sprites as demonstrated by Eiko's Cardboard Cutouts resource pack. It is highly recommended you play with the following add-ons as well for the best experience! QLAPS - Questionably Lore Accurate Pokemon Spawns by Frank the Farmer https://modrinth.com/datapack/questionably-lore-accurate-pokemon-spawns Cardboard Cutout Mon Resourcepack by Eiko https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cardboard-cutout-mon This expansion contains all pokemon regional variants, with world spawns included for both them and their normal counterparts/pre-evolutions! Certain pokemon may require you to restart your world after evolving due to a bug with interactions between the official mod and the datapack. Don't worry, the evolutions work! Just needs a restart. If you have questions, please contact KNBrisson#4261 on the official cobblemon discord, or ask in the official Regional Rituals support channel. Known Bugs: - Corsola doesn't have a sprite, but is included in the natural spawns. - Sandslash spawns at a grand level 6-30, instead of 22-45.
